title: Infinity Totem
description: All items can act like Totems of Undying when held
body:
# InfinityTotem

**Author:** ffobb

## ✨ Overview | 模组简介

InfinityTotem makes **every item behave like a Totem of Undying** when held.

InfinityTotem 让**所有手持物品都具备不死图腾的效果**。

## 🛠 Commands | 指令

(Admin only | 仅管理员)

/enable <player>
Enable InfinityTotem for a player  
启用某玩家的 InfinityTotem

/disable <player>
Disable InfinityTotem for a player  
禁用某玩家的 InfinityTotem

## 📦 Requirements | 依赖

- Minecraft 1.20.1
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API

## ⚠ Notes | 注意事项

- Must be installed on BOTH client and server  
  客户端和服务端都需要安装

- Works in singleplayer and multiplayer  
  支持单人与多人
